description: A 4B parameter math reasoning model fine-tuned from Qwen3-4B with a distinct casual, meme-savvy personality shaped by Menlo Research.
A 4B-parameter causal language model optimized as a fine-tuning base with 262K context length, designed for instruction following and code tasks.
An 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks like browser and desktop automation.
A small, locally-runnable code-tuned model for coding tasks and lightweight agent workflows.
**Jan-v2-VL** is an 8B vision-language model optimized for long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks in software environments like browsers and desktop apps.
Jan-Nano-128k is a compact non-thinking language model with native 128k context window designed for research applications.
A 30B vision-language model for long-horizon agentic tasks with low error accumulation, based on Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Thinking.
A 4-bit quantized version of Jan-v3-4B-base-instruct converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation, UI control, and multi-step task execution.
8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic UI automation and multi-step task execution.
**Summary:** This is an 8B-parameter bfloat16 MLX vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks, converted from Janhq's Jan-v2-VL-high.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of an 8B vision-language model optimized for UI automation and agentic tasks.
An 8-bit MLX-quantized 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
A 4-bit quantized MLX conversion of an 8B vision-language model designed for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
This is a bfloat16 MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
An 8-bit quantized MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-low, an 8B vision-language model optimized for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
MLX conversion of Jan-v2-VL-med, an 8B vision-language model for agentic automation and UI control tasks.
Qwen3.5-35B-A3B is Alibaba's multimodal MoE language model with 35B total/3B active parameters, supporting 262K context length and vision capabilities.
Olmo 3 Think is a 7B open language model by Ai2 with chain-of-thought reasoning, trained on Dolma 3 and Dolci datasets, excelling at math, coding, and reasoning tasks.

Olmo 3 7B Instruct is an open-source 7B parameter language model by Allen Institute for AI, trained on Dolma 3 data, with strong math and reasoning capabilities, using <|im_start|> chat template and Apache 2.0 license.
A 32B parameter open language model with chain-of-thought reasoning capabilities developed by Allen AI.
This is a 4-bit quantized Gemma 3 4B Instruct model converted to MLX format for image-text-to-text tasks on Apple Silicon.
A text-to-speech model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
MLX-converted text generation model from Kimi-K2.5 for Apple Silicon.
MLX speech recognition model for transcribing audio files.
MLX-converted GPT-OSS-20B model for text generation.
An MLX-converted automatic speech recognition model for transcribing audio in 24 languages.
A 4-bit MLX conversion of Mistral's Devstral-Small-2-24B-Instruct-2512 vision language model.
A 4-bit quantized MLX version of the Google Gemma 3 12B instruction-tuned model, converted for use with the `mlx-vlm` library.
This is an MLX conversion of the Gemma 3 27B Instruct model.
A 4-bit quantized 1B parameter instruction-tuned Llama 3.2 model converted to MLX format for text generation on Apple Silicon.
4-bit quantized Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B model converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon.
A 4-bit quantized Qwen3-30B-A3B model converted to MLX format.
This is a 4-bit quantized version of the Google Gemma 3 1B instruction-tuned model, converted to MLX format for Apple Silicon using the `mlx-lm` library.
4-bit quantized Qwen3.5-9B MLX model for Apple Silicon vision-language inference.
Google's Gemma 4 mixture-of-experts instruction-tuned model, offering strong performance with efficient active parameter usage.

Google's Gemma 4 dense instruction-tuned model, designed for general-purpose text generation and understanding.

An uncensored GGUF version of Qwen3.5-9B with zero refusals, supporting text, images, and video in multiple quantizations.

A Qwen3.5-4B reasoning model fine-tuned with Claude-4.6 Opus chain-of-thought distillation using LoRA, featuring structured `<think>` thinking tags and improved benchmarks on GPQA (38.88) and ARC-Challenge (66.38).
